title: pavonia fulva
intro: Pavonia fulva, also known as the red rose-mallow or swampmallow, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mallow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pavonia fulva include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Pavonia fulva include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or orally, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
